channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Barbara Lee Praised Defunding Police; Now Her SUV Has Been Swiped From City Hall
Anna Murdoch-Mann, author and philanthropist, dead at 81
item.description: Anna Murdoch-Mann, Rupert Murdoch's ex-wife and News Corp partner, dies at 81. The philanthropist devoted her life to children's causes and charity wo...

item.title: Fox News Poll: Trump’s tariffs faced broad disapproval even before Supreme Court ruling
item.description: New Fox News poll shows 63% of voters disapprove of Trump's tariff handling despite record revenue surge of over 300% since taking office this year.

item.title: Is This a Case of Fantasy Weaving at The Atlantic? A Bizarre Fake Report May Have Fooled Its Editors
Omar calls GOP probe into husband’s $30M business surge a ‘political stunt’ as records deadline passes
item.description: Rep. Ilhan Omar called GOP investigation into her finances a "political stunt" as the deadline to provide business records about husband's companies b...

item.title: Presser: President Trump Reacts to Supreme Court Tariff Decision
Democrats cheer Supreme Court move blocking Trump tariffs — despite past support for trade duties
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries and Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer led Democrats in praising the Supreme Court on Friday for striking down...

item.title: Climate, Energy Experts Shower Praise on Trump's Endangerment Finding Repeal
Trump Delivers Affordable Meds Through Big Pharma Handshakes
Trump gives grudging praise to liberal trio who helped sink his tariffs
item.description: Supreme Court rules 6-3 that President Donald Trump exceeded authority using emergency powers for tariffs, with conservative justices dissenting from ...
